prompt:
Create a Python script called custom_metadata.py that uses the pxr library to demonstrate USD's extensibility features. The script must create a file called pipeline.usda containing:

1. Default prim /Project
2. /Project has custom metadata via SetCustomDataByKey: "pipeline:version" = "2.1", "pipeline:department" = "lighting"
3. /Project has assetInfo with name="hero_asset" and identifier="assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
4. /Project/Hero — an Xform with purpose set to "render" (UsdGeom.Tokens.render)
5. /Project/Hero/Proxy — an Xform with purpose set to "proxy" (UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)
6. /Project/Hero/Guide — an Xform with purpose set to "guide" (UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)
7. /Project/Hero has custom properties:
   - "custom:shotName" as a string property with value "SH010"
   - "custom:frameRange" as a Int2 property with value (1001, 1100)
8. /Project/Hero should have UsdGeom.ModelAPI applied with kind set to "component"

Use: from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1775567263362,"sessionID":"ses_297f1d79effecXylmi5WQvBjQH","part":{"id":"prt_d680e532c001t1ImNOeEexAISh","sessionID":"ses_297f1d79effecXylmi5WQvBjQH","messageID":"msg_d680e2c8f001yoW2voz9smB0c0","type":"tool","callID":"call_5bd3893cecbd4098aa08ab3e","tool":"write","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"content":"#!/usr/bin/env python

from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

def create_pipeline_usd():
    """Create a USD file with custom metadata and extensibility features."""
    
    # Create a new USD stage
    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")
    
    # 1. Create default prim /Project
    project_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project")
    
    # 2. Set custom metadata on /Project
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")
    
    # 3. Set assetInfo on /Project
    asset_info = {
        "name": "hero_asset",
        "identifier": "assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
    }
    project_prim.SetAssetInfo(asset_info)
    
    # 4. Create /Project/Hero with purpose "render"
    hero_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero")
    hero_prim.SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.render)
    
    # 5. Create /Project/Hero/Proxy with purpose "proxy"
    proxy_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    proxy_prim.SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)
    
    # 6. Create /Project/Hero/Guide with purpose "guide"
    guide_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Guide")
    guide_prim.SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)
    
    # 7. Set custom properties on /Project/Hero
    # String property
    hero_prim.CreateCustomPropertyAPI("custom:shotName", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String)
    hero_prim.GetCustomPropertyAPI("custom:shotName").Set("SH010")
    
    # Int2 property
    hero_prim.CreateCustomPropertyAPI("custom:frameRange", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Int2)
    hero_prim.GetCustomPropertyAPI("custom:frameRange").Set(Gf.V2i(1001, 1100))
    
    # 8. Apply UsdGeom.ModelAPI with kind "component"
    model_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_prim)
    model_api.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)
    
    # Save the stage
    stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_pipeline_usd()
    print("Successfully created pipeline.usda with custom metadata and extensibility features.")","filePath":"/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-jtdjc97f/custom_metadata.py"},"output":"Wrote file successfully.

conversation.content: I'll create a Python script that demonstrates USD's extensibility features using the pxr library. Let me start by creating the script.

{
  "content": "#!/usr/bin/env python

from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

def create_pipeline_usd():
    """Create a USD file with custom metadata and extensibility features."""
    
    # Create a new USD stage
    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")
    
    # 1. Create default prim /Project
    project_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project")
    
    # 2. Set custom metadata on /Project
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")
    
    # 3. Set assetInfo on /Project
    asset_info = {
        "name": "hero_asset",
        "identifier": "assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
    }
    project_prim.SetAssetInfo(asset_info)
    
    # 4. Create /Project/Hero with purpose "render"
    hero_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero")
    hero_prim.SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.render)
    
    # 5. Create /Project/Hero/Proxy with purpose "proxy"
    proxy_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    proxy_prim.SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)
    
    # 6. Create /Project/Hero/Guide with purpose "guide"
    guide_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Guide")
    guide_prim.SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)
    
    # 7. Set custom properties on /Project/Hero
    # String property
    hero_prim.CreateCustomPropertyAPI("custom:shotName", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String)
    hero_prim.GetCustomPropertyAPI("custom:shotName").Set("SH010")
    
    # Int2 property
    hero_prim.CreateCustomPropertyAPI("custom:frameRange", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Int2)
    hero_prim.GetCustomPropertyAPI("custom:frameRange").Set(Gf.V2i(1001, 1100))
    
    # 8. Apply UsdGeom.ModelAPI with kind "component"
    model_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_prim)
    model_api.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)
    
    # Save the stage
    stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_pipeline_usd()
    print("Successfully created pipeline.usda with custom metadata and extensibility features.")",
  "filePath": "/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-jtdjc97f/custom_metadata.py"
}

  "newString": "#!/usr/bin/env python

from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

def create_pipeline_usd():
    """Create a USD file with custom metadata and extensibility features."""
    
    # Create a new USD stage
    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")
    
    # 1. Create default prim /Project
    project_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project")
    
    # 2. Set custom metadata on /Project
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")
    
    # 3. Set assetInfo on /Project
    asset_info = {
        "name": "hero_asset",
        "identifier": "assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
    }
    project_prim.SetAssetInfo(asset_info)
    
    # 4. Create /Project/Hero with purpose "render"
    hero_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero")
    hero_prim.SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.render)
    
    # 5. Create /Project/Hero/Proxy with purpose "proxy"
    proxy_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    proxy_prim.SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)
    
    # 6. Create /Project/Hero/Guide with purpose "guide"
    guide_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Guide")
    guide_prim.SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)
    
    # 7. Set custom properties on /Project/Hero
    # String property
    hero_prim.CreateCustomPropertyAPI("custom:shotName", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String)
    hero_prim.GetCustomPropertyAPI("custom:shotName").Set("SH010")
    
    # Int2 property
    hero_prim.CreateCustomPropertyAPI("custom:frameRange", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Int2)
    hero_prim.GetCustomPropertyAPI("custom:frameRange").Set(Gf.V2i(1001, 1100))
    
    # 8. Apply UsdGeom.ModelAPI with kind "component"
    model_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_prim)
    model_api.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)
    
    # Save the stage
    stage.GetRootLayer().Save()"
}

    """Create a USD file with custom metadata and extensibility features."""
    
    # Create a new USD stage
    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")
    
    # 1. Create default prim /Project
    project_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project")
    
    # 2. Set custom metadata on /Project
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")
    
    # 3. Set assetInfo on /Project
    asset_info = {
        "name": "hero_asset",
        "identifier": "assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
    }
    project_prim.SetAssetInfo(asset_info)
    
    # 4. Create /Project/Hero with purpose "render"
    hero_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero")
    UsdGeom.Xform(hero_prim).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.render)
    
    # 5. Create /Project/Hero/Proxy with purpose "proxy"
    proxy_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    UsdGeom.Xform(proxy_prim).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)
    
    # 6. Create /Project/Hero/Guide with purpose "guide"
    guide_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Guide")
    UsdGeom.Xform(guide_prim).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)
    
    # 7. Set custom properties on /Project/Hero
    # String property
    hero_prim.CreateCustomPropertyAPI("custom:shotName", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String)
    hero_prim.GetCustomPropertyAPI("custom:shotName").Set("SH010")
    
    # Int2 property
    hero_prim.CreateCustomPropertyAPI("custom:frameRange", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Int2)
    hero_prim.GetCustomPropertyAPI("custom:frameRange").Set(Gf.V2i(1001, 1100))
    
    # 8. Apply UsdGeom.ModelAPI with kind "component"
    model_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_prim)
    model_api.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)
    
    # Save the stage
    stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_pipeline_usd()
    print("Successfully created pipeline.usda with custom metadata and extensibility features.")",

    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")
    
    # 1. Create default prim /Project
    project_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project")
    
    # 2. Set custom metadata on /Project
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")
    
    # 3. Set assetInfo on /Project
    asset_info = {
        "name": "hero_asset",
        "identifier": "assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
    }
    project_prim.SetAssetInfo(asset_info)
    
    # 4. Create /Project/Hero with purpose "render"
    hero_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero")
    hero_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("purpose", "render")
    
    # 5. Create /Project/Hero/Proxy with purpose "proxy"
    proxy_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    proxy_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("purpose", "proxy")
    
    # 6. Create /Project/Hero/Guide with purpose "guide"
    guide_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Guide")
    guide_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("purpose", "guide")
    
    # 7. Set custom properties on /Project/Hero
    # String property
    hero_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("custom:shotName", "SH010")
    
    # Int2 property
    frame_range = Gf.Vec2i(1001, 1100)
    hero_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("custom:frameRange", frame_range)
    
    # 8. Apply UsdGeom.ModelAPI with kind "component"
    model_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_prim)
    model_api.SetKind(Kind.component)
    
    # Save the stage
    stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_pipeline_usd()
    print("Successfully created pipeline.usda with custom metadata and extensibility features.")",

files.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python

from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind


def create_pipeline_usd():
    """Create a USD file with custom metadata and extensibility features."""

    # Create a new USD stage
    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")

    # 1. Create default prim /Project
    project_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project")

    # 2. Set custom metadata on /Project
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
    project_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")

    # 3. Set assetInfo on /Project
    asset_info = {"name": "hero_asset", "identifier": "assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"}
    project_prim.SetAssetInfo(asset_info)

    # 4. Create /Project/Hero with purpose "render"
    hero_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero")
    hero_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("purpose", "render")

    # 5. Create /Project/Hero/Proxy with purpose "proxy"
    proxy_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Proxy")
    proxy_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("purpose", "proxy")

    # 6. Create /Project/Hero/Guide with purpose "guide"
    guide_prim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide")
    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Project/Hero/Guide")
    guide_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("purpose", "guide")

    # 7. Set custom properties on /Project/Hero
    # String property
    hero_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("custom:shotName", "SH010")

    # Int2 property
    frame_range = Gf.Vec2i(1001, 1100)
    hero_prim.SetCustomDataByKey("custom:frameRange", frame_range)

    # 8. Apply UsdGeom.ModelAPI with kind "component"
    model_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_prim)
    model_api.GetPrim().SetMetadata("kind", "component")

    # Save the stage
    stage.GetRootLayer().Save()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_pipeline_usd()
    print(
        "Successfully created pipeline.usda with custom metadata and extensibility features."
    )
